title: dupatya capillacea
intro: Dupatya capillacea, also known as Indian gentian or gentianella, is a perennial plant species belonging to the gentian family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dupatya capillacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Dupatya capillacea can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
